narrative:
Precinct Holloway Village (precinct in Belmont County) has 172 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.9%, a modest Republican lean of 2.9 percentage points.
